title: Argentina vs Croatia - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 1
description: This is the third World Cup meeting between Argentina and Croatia, and first in the knockout stages. Argentina won 1-0 in 1998, before Croatia's 3-0 win in the 2018 edition in Russia. Argentina are looking to reach the World Cup final for the sixth time, a figure bettered only by Germany. They've never been eliminated at the semi-final stage before

title: France vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Semi Finals 2
description: France have never lost against Morocco, with all five of their previous meetings coming in friendlies. The most recent encounter was a 2-2 draw in Saint-Denis in November 2007. France have alternated between victory and defeat in their six World Cup meetings with African nations, losing 1-0 against Tunisia last time out in this year's group stage.

title: Croatia vs Morocco - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 3rd Place
description: This is the second meeting between Croatia and Morocco at this World Cup, having played out a 0-0 draw on MD1. Croatia were restricted to five shots, their fewest ever in a World Cup match. title: Argentina vs France - FIFA World Cup Qatar 2022 Final
description: Argentina are competing in their sixth World Cup final, with only Germany participating in more. They're looking to win the trophy for a third time along with 1978 and 1986, but defeat would see them with the joint-most World Cup final losses in history. title: All Goals of Fifa Wc 2022
description: All the. Goals of the FIFA WC 2022

title: Best Memories of the World Cup 2022
description: The World cup 2022 was amazing. All beIN’s talents are remembering their best memories during this unforgettable event

title: Tarek Dhiab - Witness
description: Tarek Dhiab reviewing Tunisia in World cup 1978

title: Mexico City - Stories From the City

description: Argentina vs Netherlands – FIFA World Cup Final 1978
